soft_throttle.action: halve stake (k -> 0.5k) for next 20 betting days, then re-evaluate

hard_stop.action: pause betting for 20 betting days, then resume at half stake

notes.interpretation: recommended_stake_k scales the unit-stake strategy. If you treated 1 unit = £1 previously, then stake_k ≈ £ per bet. If you bet in £0.10 increments, round stake_k accordingly.
notes.why_month_blocks: Month blocks preserve clustering and are more conservative than quarter blocks.
notes.drag: Per-bet drag is applied daily as drag * n_bets to approximate commission/slippage/edge decay.
